summary: CRITICAL: Deliverable is incomplete. Task requires test file ArtifactCleanup.Tests.ps1 and TDD methodology—neither provided. Workflow references non-existent test file at line 15, causing immediate failure. Missing: error handling (no Set-StrictMode, $ErrorActionPreference, parameter validation), input guards (negative MaxAgeDays, null SizeBytes/CreatedAt), test fixtures, act-result.txt output file required by spec. Script lacks try-catch blocks; functions assume well-formed input. 'Run cleanup demo' (line 28–52) is demo-code, not actual Pester testing. No assertions on output. Will fail on `act` run due to missing .Tests.ps1 file.
